evals.prompt: Add a lightweight test for StepIndicator so packages/ui has coverage for a simple presentational component.
evals.expected_output: Use ui-test-authoring, write a co-located Component.test.tsx file, add file-level jsdom, use @testing-library/react, and assert public render behavior instead of styling internals.

evals.prompt: Audit ConfirmDialog for missing test coverage around conditional rendering, async confirmation, and callback behavior.
evals.expected_output: Use ui-test-authoring to produce a focused audit that prioritizes user-visible behavior, callback flow, and interaction risk, without centering implementation details.
